untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'doji formation at top of uptrend' and 'bearish phase market context' which require multi-bar pattern recognition and trend regime analysis beyond simple indicator thresholds. The body_pct condition approximates doji (small body), but confirming it appears at an uptrend top requires lookback logic not expressible in this framework.
translation_notes: Gravestone Doji approximated using body_pct < 0.05 (small body) and upper_wick > lower_wick (long upper wick characteristic). Entry conditions are context-dependent per source: continuation ~50% of the time. Exit conditions inferred as reversal through candle breach. Reversal rate 50-53% suggests directional ambiguity; marked as CONTEXT_DEPENDENT. Success rate 59% bear noted but applied to reversal probability rather than specific threshold.
